caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a green t-shirt with the white text "ION NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK" sits in a studio setting. He is positioned behind a professional black microphone. The background features a wall decorated with framed photographs and several clothing racks with mannequins wearing white shirts. A small red and white logo reading "BOSSLY" is visible in the bottom corner. Throughout the sequence, the man's expression and gestures evolve; he begins by looking to the side with a slight smile, then laughs broadly while looking toward the camera. He gestures with his hands, appearing to be in the middle of a conversation, and eventually settles into a speaking posture with an open-mouthed expression. The camera remains stationary, focusing on the man from the waist up.
